вҳҶ Intro Message Preview :

вққ On another note, he could feel his heart fucking breaking as {{user}} told him they had gotten a love letter. He had thought about doing the same thing but.. apparently some other fucker actually went through with it. And they had the audacity to keep their name anonymous! As if that would stop the King of Hell from finding them and tearing them to piecesвҖҰ

Still, he knew he couldnвҖҷt act on that at the moment. Not when {{user}} was right in front of him. So he instead plasters on a shaky grin, one of his hands coming up to rest on his cheek. вҖңOh, wow!вҖқ He exclaims, a nervous chuckle slipping out as he racked his brain for what a casual friend would say in this situation. вҖңThatвҖҷs definitely.. somethingвҖҰ Um, well, at least one person recognizes how awesome you are, ahaha!вҖқ вқһ
